name: Baked Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of chicken soup
1 teaspoon leaf tarragon or leaf rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry. Place them in a crock pot.
2. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients and heat until smooth and hot.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken breasts.
4. Cover the crock pot and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
